html:
Exclusive to:

The Red Crown trinket was added as part of the Cult of the Lamb Crossover. It can be obtained from a Crumpled Package which can be found by fishing in the Lake at the Oasis.

Giving a Red Crown to the Antlion will reward the player with the rare Blueprints for the Humble Lamb Idol, Gold Flooring, and Brick Flooring.

×8

Gallery

  • Unused Red Crown animation

“What a crowning achievement.”
–Wilson
“Finder's keepers.”
–Willow
“Is spooky crown for tiny head.”
–Wolfgang
“I wonder whose head it toppled from.”
–Wendy
“ERROR: UNABLE TO IDENTIFY POINT OF ORIGIN”
–WX-78
“Oh dear, did it just blink at me?”
–Wickerbottom
“They don't make headwear like that in Canada.”
–Woodie
“Not my size, sadly.”
–Maxwell
“A cröwn öf ill ömen.”
–Wigfrid
“Is it looking at us?”
–Webber
“What an odd little chapeau.”
–Warly
“Watching”
–Wormwood
“Awfully high-and-mighty, huh?”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, how tempting!”
–Wortox
“Crown belong to Mermfolk now!”
–Wurt
“I hope whoever lost it isn't missing it too much.”
–Walter
“A little lost, are you?”
–Wanda
The Red Crown trinket was added as part of the Cult of the Lamb Crossover. It can be obtained from a Crumpled Package which can be found by fishing in the Lake at the Oasis.
Giving a Red Crown to the Antlion will reward the player with the rare Blueprints for the Humble Lamb Idol, Gold Flooring, and Brick Flooring.

The '''Red Crown''' trinket was added as part of the [[Cult of the Lamb Crossover]]. It can be obtained from a [[Crumpled Package]] which can be found by fishing in the [[Lake]] at the Oasis.

Giving a Red Crown to the [[Antlion]] will reward the player with the rare [[Blueprint]]s for the [[Humble Lamb Idol]], [[Gold Flooring]], and [[Brick Flooring]].
{{Recipe
|item = Red Crown
|gold = yes
|result = Gold Nugget
|resultcount = 8
}}
{{Recipe
|item = Red Crown
|tool = Antlion
|result = Blueprint (rare)
}}
